name: the rule drafter covers an enforceable clause with a deterministic tool DSL rule (Layer B)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-ts-no-var --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var; use const or let.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const d=require(process.cwd()+"/d.json");if(d.clauses_covered<1)process.exit(1);if(!d.coverage_report.some(c=>c.status==="covered"&&c.binding.dsl_rule==="no-var"))process.exit(1)' && echo dsl-covered 1>&2
